community.headline: 150K Strong
community.description: As a faculty dedicated to teaching Quantitative Aptitude and Reasoning for bank examinations, reaching the milestone of 150,000 subscribers on YouTube is truly humbling. This achievement would not have been possible without the consistent trust, support, and dedication of my students. Your belief in my teaching and your commitment to learning motivate me to continuously deliver quality content and guide you toward your goals.
community.description2: I am sincerely grateful to each one of you for being a part of this journey and for making this learning community stronger every day.

testimonials.name: Maruti Bellikoppa
testimonials.quote: As a proud selected RRB PO officer, my bank exam journey began really tough – quant felt overwhelming and reasoning questions were confusing. Yashraj Sir's clear guidance made everything simple! He taught easy shortcuts for quick quant solving, like handling data interpretation and simple interest super fast. Reasoning turned easy with tips on puzzles and coding-decoding. Daily fun quizzes fixed my errors, and mocks built confidence for timed pressure. Accuracy hit 90%, cleared cutoffs smoothly. Yashraj Sir, thanks for making my dream come true!

testimonials.name: Priyadarshani Dhal
testimonials.quote: 2025 में मैंने SBI क्लर्क और IBPS क्लर्क की प्रतियोगी परीक्षाएं सफलतापूर्वक पास कीं। इस पूरे सफर में यशराज सर का विशेष योगदान रहा। उन्होंने विश्वास दिलाया था कि यदि हम सही दिशा में मेहनत करें और उनके बताए रास्ते पर चलें, तो मंजिल अपने आप आसान हो जाएगी। मैंने उनके कहे अनुसार पूरी मेहनत और लगन से पढ़ाई की, और नतीजा यह रहा कि दोनों ही परीक्षाओं में मेरी सफलता सुनिश्चित हो गई।

testimonials.name: Akshay
testimonials.quote: Preparing for bank exams was full of challenges and self-doubt, but your QSS (Question Selection Skill) and LUA (Language Understanding Approach) completely transformed my preparation strategy. Learning how to choose the right questions and understand language concepts deeply helped me perform with confidence. I am truly grateful to Yashraj Sir for guiding me toward my bank exam selection.

testimonials.name: Mayur Suryawanshi
testimonials.result: SBI PO, IBPS PO, SBI JA, IBPS CLK 2025
testimonials.quote: As a bank exam aspirant, my journey was filled with pressure, fear, and constant self-doubt. Yashraj Sir’s guidance became the turning point in my preparation. His unique teaching methods, clear concepts, and practical strategies helped me build confidence step by step. The way he simplified complex topics and motivated us to stay consistent made all the difference.

testimonials.name: Nitin Kumar
testimonials.quote: Success in bank exams demands the right strategy more than just hard work, and I found that direction under Yashraj Sir’s guidance. His QSS (Question Selection Skill) helped me choose questions wisely, while LUA (Language Understanding Approach) improved my accuracy and confidence.

testimonials.name: Megha
testimonials.quote: What truly set my bank exam preparation apart was learning how to think smartly during the exam. Yashraj Sir taught me effective strategies for question selection, time management, and accuracy, which made the exam feel much more manageable.

faqs.question: What courses do you offer?
faqs.answer: We offer coaching for competitive exams like SSC, IBPS, SBI, RRB, Insurance Exams, Entrance tests like CAT, MBA, XAT, CLAT, SAT, etc.

faqs.question: Do you offer both offline and online classes?
faqs.answer: Yes, now we are offering both offline and online classes.

faqs.question: Is there a free demo class available?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer free demo classes for every course and batch.

faqs.question: Which subjects are offered under your coaching program?
faqs.answer: We offer expert coaching in Quantitative Aptitude and Reasoning.

faqs.question: What are the class timings?
faqs.answer: Class timings vary depending on the course and batch. For detailed schedule information, please contact us.

faqs.question: Do you offer interview preparation as well?
faqs.answer: Yes, we help students with interview preparation.

faqs.question: Do you also provide doubt-clearing and guidance classes?
faqs.answer: Yes, we conduct doubt-clearing and guidance classes at regular intervals.

about.headline: Veteran by Yashraj Singh Chauhan
achievements: Cleared SBI PO, IBPS PO, RRB PO, RBI ASST., etc.
paragraphs: I am Yashraj Singh Chauhan, the founder of Veteran. My purpose is to provide comprehensive and high-quality content in Quantitative Aptitude specifically designed for Bank, CAT, SSC, and Insurance exam aspirants.

At Veteran, we firmly believe that conceptual clarity is the foundation of success in any competitive exam. Our unique approach focuses on understanding the core concepts deeply, enabling you to solve problems with confidence and efficiency.

This conceptual foundation is what sets us apart. Remember, learning the right concepts and honing your logical skills are the keys to achieving your goals. Once you master these, you'll realize that you do not need to rely on irrelevant or superficial material available online. Focused, concept-driven preparation is the most effective way to excel.
